# Top-level Project

Some preamble that explains why this file exists.

## Backend

### API Routes

#### Public

- MUST set CORS headers explicitly.

#### Private

- MUST require an authenticated session.

### Database

#### Migrations

- MUST be reversible.

## Frontend

### Components

#### Server

- SHOULD avoid client-only APIs.

#### Client

- MAY use `useEffect` when necessary.
